echo "=== 1. Git 全局身份 ==="
git config --global user.name 2>/dev/null || echo "(未设)"
git config --global user.email 2>/dev/null || echo "(未设)"
echo ""
echo "=== 2. Git credential helper(影响 HTTPS 推送的凭证来源)==="
git config --global credential.helper 2>/dev/null || echo "(未设)"
echo ""
